# CWE-523 positive: login served on cleartext HTTP (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-523-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func StartCleartextLogin(db *sql.DB) *http.Server {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/login", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		_ = r.ParseForm()
		user := r.FormValue("username")
		pass := r.FormValue("password")
		_ = db.QueryRow("SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ? AND password = ?", user, pass)
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})
	return &http.Server{Addr: ":8080", Handler: mux}
}
